headline: Jordan Henderson
body: Jordan Henderson will not travel back to Kansas City with the squad this evening and will stay back in Mexico City with a member of England medical staff after injuring his wrist in win over Mexico. bbc.com/sport/football/live/… Link World Cup 2026 highlights: England into last eight after beating Mexico England v Mexico highlights & reaction as Jude Bellingham scores twice to help Thomas Tuchel's side reach the 2026 Fifa World Cup quarter-final. bbc.com
raw_text:
Jordan Henderson will not travel back to Kansas City with the squad this evening and will stay back in Mexico City with a member of England medical staff after injuring his wrist in win over Mexico. bbc.com/sport/football/live/…

Link



World Cup 2026 highlights: England into last eight after beating Mexico

England v Mexico highlights & reaction as Jude Bellingham scores twice to help Thomas Tuchel's side reach the 2026 Fifa World Cup quarter-final.
